diagrams.title: Basic Control Flow Graph Structure
diagrams.description: Shows nodes (circles) as statements/decisions and edges (arrows) as flow of execution for a simple if-else structure
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to construct CFG and identify nodes/edges

diagrams.title: Cyclomatic Complexity Formula Visualization
diagrams.description: Three visual methods to calculate cyclomatic complexity: graph formula, decision points, and regions
diagrams.purpose: Visualize different ways to calculate complexity

diagrams.title: Independent Paths Example
diagrams.description: A sample CFG showing 4 independent paths through nested if-else statements
elements: Four basis paths highlighted in different colors
diagrams.purpose: Understand how independent paths are identified and counted
